corrections.note: The locator reads 'I 34' (roman I, space, 34 — chapter I verse 34 begins this page), not '134'.
Image reads dative singular 'χαλκείῳ δεσμῷ' (with iota subscripts), not plural 'χαλκεῖς δεσμοῖς'.
Dative plural of σκεῦος is σκεύεσιν; transcription drops the σ.
Variant is aorist participle δήσας, not nonsense 'ὄησας'; initial δ was misread as ὄ.
Nomen sacrum θ̄ς̄ (=θεός) was read as 'δς'.
Nomen sacrum θ̄ς̄ (=θεός) with overline was read as 'ὁς' (spiritus asper).

uncertain.note: Order of 'Ιωακ./Ιωκ.' abbreviations between A* and Aᵃ? may be reversed versus the transcription's 'Ιωακειμ A* Ιωκ. Aᵃ?'.
Transcription 'πηηρου B*' — exact letters (πηηρου vs πηρον, etc.) not fully legible in scan.
